name: set_hierarchy_separator
full_help:
set_hierarchy_separator

Description: 
Set hierarchical separator character

Syntax: 
set_hierarchy_separator  [-quiet] [-verbose] [<separator>]

Usage: 
  Name           Description
  --------------------------
  [-quiet]       Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]     Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<separator>]  Hierarchy separator character
                 Default: /

Categories: 
SDC, XDC

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
